_meta.description: Construction Safety Detection API — frontend reference

process_image.example_request_js: const fd = new FormData(); fd.append('file', fileInput.files[0]); fetch('/api/v1/process-image', { method: 'POST', body: fd })

example_response_error.message: Image conversion failed: cannot identify image file

notes: Frames are sampled at VIDEO_FRAME_SAMPLE_INTERVAL (default 1 second) to minimise device load
Only frames containing violations are included in violation_frames
frames_analyzed = total number of frames that were processed
Processing is synchronous and sequential — response arrives after full video is scanned

ProcessingResponse.results: ProcessingResult | null — null only when status is 'error'
ProcessingResponse.message: string | null — populated only when status is 'error'

VideoProcessingResponse.results: VideoProcessingResult | null — null only when status is 'error'
VideoProcessingResponse.message: string | null — populated only when status is 'error'

VideoProcessingResult.frames_analyzed: integer — number of frames sampled and processed
VideoProcessingResult.total_violations: integer — sum of all violations across all frames
VideoProcessingResult.violation_frames: FrameViolation[] — only frames that had at least one violation

FrameViolation.frame_index: integer — absolute frame number in the video
FrameViolation.timestamp_seconds: float — frame position in seconds, rounded to 2 decimals
FrameViolation.people_detected: integer — people found in this frame

Violation.missing_equipment: string[] — subset of configured required equipment
Violation.bbox: [x, y, width, height] — absolute pixel coordinates

status_values.success: All detected people have required equipment
status_values.warning: At least one person is missing required equipment

equipment_types.note: missing_equipment array will only contain values from the server's REQUIRED_EQUIPMENT setting

bbox_format.note: x,y is the top-left corner of the bounding box

MODEL_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD.description: Minimum YOLO confidence to include any detection

MIN_PERSON_ANALYSIS_CONFIDENCE.description: Minimum person detection confidence to include that person in safety analysis — prevents false violations for small/distant figures

MIN_EQUIPMENT_DETECTION_CONFIDENCE.description: Lower threshold applied to equipment detections (helmet, vest) — allows catching equipment with lower visibility

PROXIMITY_THRESHOLD.description: Multiplier on person bounding-box height to define the search radius for nearby equipment

VIDEO_FRAME_SAMPLE_INTERVAL.description: How many seconds between sampled frames in video processing

REQUIRED_EQUIPMENT.description: Comma-separated list of equipment types every person must have

video_ux_notes: Video processing is slow (sequential, 1fps sampling) — show a persistent loading state
violation_frames is empty array (not null) when there are no violations
timestamp_seconds can be used to seek the video player: videoEl.currentTime = frame.timestamp_seconds
frame_index is useful for debugging but timestamp_seconds is better for display
frontend_tips.confidence_display: Multiply by 100 and toFixed(1) for percentage display
frontend_tips.bbox_drawing: bbox = [x, y, w, h] in absolute pixels — scale to canvas/display size as needed
